gdpr_quote: For the purpose of implementing paragraphs 1, 2 and 3, the high-risk AI system shall be provided to the deployer in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate: ...
mismatch: The policy applies the oversight-enablement requirements to all AI systems, whereas the regulation limits them to high-risk AI systems.
analysis: Article 14(4) expressly addresses enabling oversight for high-risk AI systems; the policy expands this requirement to all AI systems, which is stricter than required.

gdpr_quote: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way, including with appropriate human-machine interface tools, that they can be effectively overseen by natural persons during the period in which they are in use.
mismatch: The policy extends the human-oversight design requirement beyond high-risk AI systems to all AI systems.
analysis: The regulation confines this oversight-by-design obligation to high-risk AI systems; the policy applies it more broadly, which is over-compliant.

gdpr_quote: Human oversight shall aim to prevent or minimise the risks to health, safety or fundamental rights that may emerge when a high-risk AI system is used...
mismatch: The policy generalizes human-oversight risk mitigation obligations to all AI systems, while the regulation targets high-risk AI systems.
analysis: Article 14(2) frames oversight objectives specifically for high-risk AI systems; the policy’s scope is broader and thus stricter.

gdpr_quote: (d) the human oversight measures referred to in Article 14, including the technical measures put in place to facilitate the interpretation of the outputs of the high-risk AI systems by the deployers; (e) the computational and hardware resources needed, the expected lifetime of the high-risk AI system and any necessary maintenance and care measures...
mismatch: Article 13(8) content is framed around high-risk AI systems, whereas the policy applies analogous transparency/oversight documentation expectations to all AI systems.
analysis: The regulation’s transparency and information-to-deployers items are specific to high-risk AI systems; the policy broadens the scope, which is over-compliant.

gdpr_quote: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way as to ensure that their operation is sufficiently transparent to enable deployers to interpret a system's output and use it appropriately.
mismatch: The policy applies the transparency-by-design expectation to all AI systems, while the regulation sets it for high-risk AI systems.
analysis: Article 13(1) targets high-risk AI systems; the policy adopts a broader scope, which is stricter than required.
